characters.name: Alaudi
characters.description: Alaudiアラウディ,Araudi?IdentificationTitlesFirst Generation Vongola Cloud GuardianFirst Vongola External AdvisorFirst CEDEF Boss and FounderHead of Secret Intelligence AgencyBiographical informationStatusDeceasedPhysical descriptionGenderMaleUnderground informationFamigliaVongola FamigliaDying Will FlameCloud FlameEquipmentAlaudi's HandcuffsTeamsVongola Primo & GuardiansUnnamed Secret Intelligence AgencyCEDEFBehind the scenes informationVoice actorTakashi KondoLorenzo Scattorin(Italian Dub)Anime DebutEpisode 178Manga DebutChapter 260Alaudi[1]is thefirst generation Cloud Guardianof theVongola Famiglia. He is the head of an unnamed secret intelligence agency in an unidentified country and is also the founder ofCEDEF, thus he was also the famiglia's first external advisor.[2]Alaudi was considered to be Giotto's strongest Guardian. Alaudi has platinum blonde hair and ice blue eyes. He wears a buttoned trench coat which is a dark shade of gray, his tie is black and he wears a dark purple-grey dress shirt. Similar toKyoya Hibari, Alaudi is a loner, preferring to work alone, unsocial due to feeling bound, confident with his own strength and power and not interested in fighting opponents that do not warrant their attention (just like when he refused to fight Hibari because he said that has no interest in fighting "a mere child"). Despite this, according toDino, whenever his comrades are in trouble, he will help them and show benevolence towards them more than anyone else.

characters.name: Alaudi
characters.description: Alaudiアラウディ,Araudi?IdentificationTitlesFirst Generation Vongola Cloud GuardianFirst Vongola External AdvisorFirst CEDEF Boss and FounderHead of Secret Intelligence AgencyBiographical informationStatusDeceasedPhysical descriptionGenderMaleUnderground informationFamigliaVongola FamigliaDying Will FlameCloud FlameEquipmentAlaudi's HandcuffsTeamsVongola Primo & GuardiansUnnamed Secret Intelligence AgencyCEDEFBehind the scenes informationVoice actorTakashi KondoLorenzo Scattorin(Italian Dub)Anime DebutEpisode 178Manga DebutChapter 260Alaudi[1]is thefirst generation Cloud Guardianof theVongola Famiglia. Similar toKyoya Hibari, Alaudi is a loner, preferring to work alone, unsocial due to feeling bound, confident with his own strength and power and not interested in fighting opponents that do not warrant their attention (just like when he refused to fight Hibari because he said that has no interest in fighting "a mere child"). Despite this, according toDino, whenever his comrades are in trouble, he will help them and show benevolence towards them more than anyone else.

characters.name: Albito
characters.description: Albitoアルビート,Arubīto?Fate of HeatFate of Heat IIIdentificationTitlesEvocatore BossBiographical informationStatusActivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleUnderground informationFamigliaEvocatore FamigliaDying Will FlameMist FlameEquipmentMarionettesPartnerRizonaBehind the scenes informationVoice actorKousuke KujiraiAlbitois a character from in the Nintendo DS gameKatekyō Hitman Reborn! Fate of Heatand its sequels. He is a transfer student from Italy whose father is the Boss of theEvocatore Famiglia, a Mafia Famiglia allied with the Vongola. With a mild personality that turns hostile in the face of threats to the Vongola Famiglia, he fights using the spirit technique passed down in the Evocatore Famiglia. He has long, blonde hair partially tied with a brown ribbon. His clothes consist of a black suit, purple shirt, black tie and a piece of red fabric draped around his neck. Ten years later, his hair has grown into shoulder-length.

characters.name: Alejandro
characters.description: Alejandroアレハンドロ,Arehandoro?Biographical informationStatusActivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleUnderground informationDying Will FlameFlame of NightEquipmentGinger BreadTeamsVindiceTeam BermudaBehind the scenes informationManga DebutChapter 392Alejandrois one of the earliest Vindice, alongsideBermuda von Veckenschtein. A member ofVindice, he owns theGinger Breaddolls, appearing when the destruction of a Famiglia was imminent. Like many other Vindice, Alejandro's true form is that of an emaciated, rotting zombie-like corpse. He has bandages wrapped in miscellaneous areas around his body, and has long, pale hair. Alejandro is a loyal Vindice who fanatically carries out Bermuda's orders to the very letter. Like all other Vindice, he is confident and ruthless in battle and has huge hatred for Checker Face.

characters.name: Kouyou Aoba
characters.description: Kouyou Aoba青葉 紅葉,Aoba Kōyō?IdentificationTitles10th Simon Forest GuardianAliasesHope of the Boxing World (self-proclaimed)Biographical informationBirthdayNovember 11[1]StatusActivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight169 cm[1]Weight59 kg[1]Blood typeAB[1]Underground informationFamigliaSimon FamigliaDying Will FlameForest FlameTeamsSimon Decimo & GuardiansTeam SkullBehind the scenes informationVoice actorRyōhei Kimura(inVOMIC)Manga DebutChapter 284Kouyou Aoba[2]is a member of theSimon Famigliawho previously attendedSimon Middle School, but he and his family transferred toNamimoriafter an earthquake hit their area. They chose Namimori because it is relatively earthquake free and they are invited to the Vongola Decimo'sInheritance Ceremony. Kouyou uses boxing gloves as his weapon, just likeRyohei Sasagawa. Both he and Ryohei also have the same temper as seen when they quickly get angry and neither of them want to stop the fight. Kouyou's regular attire seems to consist of his school uniform, and despite his appearance, it belies his brash personality similar toRyohei Sasagawa. Furthermore, it hides his incredibly fit body, which usually appears slender with his top on. He commonly wears small-framed glasses that are pitch black when looked through, but seems like regular glasses to anyone looking at him and possesses green hair as well as red eyes which seems to be a trait shared amongst the other members ofSimon Famiglia. His bespectacled appearance gives off the impression that he is a bright individual; however, it only belies his actual intelligence. Kouyou andRyohei Sasagawashare the same love of boxing that Kouyou even has self-proclaimed himself as "the Hope of the Boxing World." Despite his love of boxing, his hate forVongolaexceeds and takes precedence over it. In fact, he has stated that he has no boxer pride as his fists are a way to live. This contradicts Ryohei, who has incredible respect for boxing and all of his aspects and fights for is friends. In combat he seems to favor anything but a fair fight, preferring to fight allowing everything that is forbidden in sanctioned boxing including "throwing sand in the eyes, kneeing and any other form of foul play" Another similarity between the two is that both have some kind of catchphrase. Ryohei refers to many instances as "Extreme" while Kouyou tends to end his sentences with "In the end." He seems to be the most brash member of the transfer students and also seems to portray a more colder side. He easily becomes enraged at even the slightest negative comment towards himself or his Famiglia. Kouyou showed disapproval of his Famiglia being considered beneath Vongola whenHayato Gokuderamade said comment, which could have escalated if it were not forAdelheid Suzukiintervening. Still, Kouyou seems to have bitter relationships with his Famiglia members. One such example isJulie Kato, who he considers lazy when he refuses to partake in his duties. He is not above making fun ofEnma Kozato, who is

Still, Kouyou seems to have bitter relationships with his Famiglia members. One such example isJulie Kato, who he considers lazy when he refuses to partake in his duties. He is not above making fun ofEnma Kozato, who is the boss of the Famiglia. He seems to be more respectful to women or at least

characters.description: Apeアーペ,Āpe?Biographical informationStatusActivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleUnderground informationFamigliaMillefiore FamigliaDying Will FlameLightning FlameBox WeaponElectric HornetTeamsBlack SpellBehind the scenes informationVoice actorEisuke TsudaDavide Fazio(Italian dub)Anime DebutEpisode 84Apeis a filler character in the anime shown during the training period before theMerone BaseInvasion. Davide Fazio(Italian dub) Ape has short, side-parted mud-brown hair and a goatee. He wears the Millefiore Black Spell uniform.

characters.name: Arachide Brothers
characters.description: Arachide Brothersアラキデ,Arakide?IdentificationTitlesD Rank White Spell MemberBiographical informationStatusActivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleUnderground informationFamigliaMillefiore FamigliaDying Will FlameStorm FlameEquipmentBoomerangTeamsWhite SpellBehind the scenes informationVoice actorSatoshi HinoAlessio Mussap (Italian Dub)Anime DebutEpisode 112TheArachide Brothersare twins who were members of the White Spell of theMillefiore Famiglia. They only appeared in the anime. Alessio Mussap (Italian Dub) The Arachide Brothers first appeared during their mission to fightTakeshi Yamamotowhile he was trying to find his way in theMerone Base. It wasShoichi Iriethat had sent them. The truth is, he knew that the Arachide brothers would lose to Yamamoto's power, but he did it to test Yamamoto's level as well as the entire Merone Base plan.

In theFuture Arc, she was shown to have died due to an illness, likely because the Sky Arcobaleno are cursed with short lifespans. Alice Bertocchi(Italian Dub) Aria with her Sky Arcobaleno outfit

characters.name: Ugetsu Asari
characters.description: Ugetsu Asari朝利 雨月,Asari Ugetsu?IdentificationTitlesFirst Vongola Rain GuardianBiographical informationStatusDeceasedPhysical descriptionGenderMaleUnderground informationFamigliaVongola FamigliaDying Will FlameRain FlameEquipmentUgetsu Asari's Four Irregular SwordsTeamsVongola Primo & GuardiansBehind the scenes informationVoice actorShouma YamamotoMassimo Di Benedetto(Italian Dub)Anime DebutEpisode 170Manga DebutChapter 246Ugetsu Asariis thefirst generation Rain Guardianof theVongola Famigliaand a Japanese man who loved music. It was said that there was no one who could match his skills with the blade. He physically resemblesTakeshi YamamotoandReborncompared Yamamoto giving up baseball to the first Rain Guardian giving up music: both did so to excel at swordsmanship for the sake of their friends in the Vongola Famiglia. Specifically, he sold his instruments for a trio of short swords and a single long sword. Koziro's Cambio Forma can form into similar swords called "Ugetsu Asari's Four Irregular Swords". He speaks with a Japanese accent that existed in the Heian period that was used by high class samurai, ninja and nobles. Takeshi Yamamotoquite strongly resembles Ugetsu with black hair and black eyes. His outfit - blue and white robe (a jōe) with a tall black hat (an eboshi) - was worn by noblemen at the Imperial Court of Japan during the Heian era (794-1185). However, in more modern times, this outfit is most often worn by Shinto priests.[1]

characters.name: Baishana
characters.description: Baishanaバイシャナ,Baishana?Biographical informationStatusActivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleUnderground informationFamigliaMillefiore FamigliaDying Will FlameStorm FlameEquipmentFlying CarpetBox WeaponSerpe TempestaCervo Volante TempestaTeamsFiore del CotoneBehind the scenes informationVoice actorBaron YamazakiIvo de Palma(Italian dub)Anime DebutEpisode 98Manga DebutChapter 172Baishanais a member of White Spell and 7th Squad captain.[1]He rides on a Storm Carpet, which functions like Storm Boots, except he sits on it. He wears a white turban and a long White Spell uniform. He does not believe that Black Spell members are his comrades and says that they are part of the "old" that needs to be wiped out, just like the Vongola. Ivo de Palma(Italian dub) Baishana was deployed to the research lab ofShoichi Irieto protect it from falling into Vongola hands; however, when his fellow defender,Nigella Beabankul, arrives, he attacks him, requesting that he hand over his Box Weapon, the Demon Bear. Baishana tricks him into accepting the battle, and they fight.

characters.name: Banchisa
characters.description: Banchisaバンキザ,Bankiza?IdentificationTitlesBertesca Mist Temple GuardianBiographical informationRelativesBertesca Primo(ancestor) †Gelaro(grandson)StatusActivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleUnderground informationFamigliaBertesca FamigliaDying Will FlameSky FlameBanchisais a game-exclusiveBertesca Famigliamafioso from the Fate of Heat DS gameKatekyo Hitman Reborn! DS Fate of Heat III - Yuki no Shugosha Raishuu!and Gelaro's grandfather. The top of Banchisa's head is bald, but he has grey hair on the sides of his head. He also has a bushy grey moustache, along with a scar running diagonally-left across his left eye. His eyes are narrow and dark. He wears a white suit with two brown and orange (respectively) scarves draped around his neck. The suit also has two vertical dark brown panels in the center. Banchisa made his first appearance whenTsunawas gathering information about how to unfreeze the Vongola Rings. He asked Banchisa, and the latter explained that the only way to unfreeze it was to destroy the seven crystals that were scattered throughout the Island, placed within seven sacred temples of the Bertesca Famiglia. Banchisa gave the map of the island as well as the location of each temple. Tsuna thanked him and left, not knowing that Banchisa was actually one of Bertesca Temple Guardians who had been ordered byGelaroto give the map and tell the Vongola of the way to unfreeze the Vongola Rings.

characters.name: Barista
characters.description: BaristaBiographical informationStatusActivePhysical descriptionGenderFemaleBehind the scenes informationManga DebutChapter 6: Russian RouletteThis unnamed woman worked at a coffee shop seen inchapter 6of themanga. As a minor character in theKatekyo Hitman Reborn!series, she is seen engaging withReborn. This woman had freckles, and her hair was parted in the centre of her head with her long bangs on either side. For the back of her hair it was tied up yet messy in style. Her clothing consisted of a dark colored T-shirt. Over this was a white apron which featured what seemed to be the coffee shop franchise logo. She was quite expressive in sharing her feelings, whether it was surprise at Reborn's demeanor to showing concern for who she regarded as a lost child. At the same time, she also kept some of her thoughts, such as how Reborn spoke, to herself while maintaining her outwardly pleasant self. Her recourse for a difficult customer was to call the store owner where she appeared justifiably indignant as well.

characters.name: Baseball Students
characters.description: Baseball StudentsBiographical informationStatusActivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleBehind the scenes informationManga DebutChapter 5: Takeshi YamamotoThese unnamed students in theKatekyo Hitman Reborn!series took part in the P.E baseball game whereTsunawas invited to the team thatYamamotowas on inChapter 5. They may not have been members of the school baseball team that Yamamoto is a member of, rather were just regularNamimori Middle School Studentspartaking in a P.E session. Thesebaseball studentsare the specific members of both sides for the P.E lesson taking place inthe manga. All the participants were boys which generally were of a similar height. None were seen to be taller than Yamamoto. Most had somewhat short hair and while most was dark-colored, there were a few light colored hair students. They wore what appeared to be the P.E uniform of a short-sleeved white T-shirt. Depending on the student, either pants or shorts were worn. What these had in common was that they were all dark-colored. Bickering took place between members on both sides, where there was also more than a few sour expressions over the matter of having someone they did not want on their team. While some members were open to the idea, and relented in having Tsuna on the team because Yamamoto said so, afterwards some returned to their unfriendly disposition towards Tsuna. Name calling was done again, they reiterated they had reasons for not wanting him on the team, and none helped Tsuna clean the field of which they commanded him to do by himself.

characters.name: Basil
characters.description: Basilバジル,Bajiru?PresentTen Years LaterIdentificationAliasesBasilBiographical informationResidenceItalyAge14[1]BirthdayJuly 23[1][2]Zodiac signCancer[1]StatusActivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight157 cm[1][2]Weight47 kg[1][2]Blood typeO[1][2]Underground informationFamigliaVongola FamigliaDying Will FlameRainEquipmentMetal EdgeBox WeaponDelfino di PioggiaTeamsCEDEFTeam Colonnello(former)Allied Team(former)Behind the scenes informationVoice actorYuka TerasakiSimone Lupinacci(Italian dub)Stage actorTaisho MaedaAnime DebutEpisode 34Manga DebutChapter 82Basilicum[1][3][2], more commonly referred to asBasil, is a member ofCEDEFand serves asIemitsu'sapprentice. He is an extremely skilled fighter and very loyal to the Sawada family. Because of his loyalty, Iemitsu trusts him enough to send him on extremely difficult missions. He is introduced in the earlyVaria Arcand turns into a recurring character, frequently showing up throughout the series. Simone Lupinacci(Italian dub) Basil has dirty blond hair and blue eyes, and is of Italian descent. His fringe tends to cover his right eye.

characters.name: Basketball Students
characters.description: Varied unnamed studentsBiographical informationStatusActivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleBehind the scenes informationManga DebutChapter 1These students are notable in theKatekyo Hitman Reborn!series for indicating howTsunais regarded by his peers. Asminor charactersthere is some significance aside from their character traits and story input in how they are the firststudentsseen in the series. In themangathat they play basketball in PE is shown. They were all male students and there were more than five. The students' hair colors were varied with most members having black hair where others had lighter colors. The hair styles were more distinct with some having upright hair, to having it appear more unstyled. Most students were physically taller than Tsuna. During the basketball game, a PE kit consisted of white T-shirts worn with long pants. The black pants had a white line down each side of the the legs. Slightly darker, but still light colored numbered tank tops were worn over the T-shirts. These were removed once the game came to an end.

characters.name: Belladonna Lily
characters.description: Belladonna Lilyベラドンナリリー,Beradonna Rirī?Background informationTypeAssassination squadAffiliation(s)Millefiore FamigliaMembersLeader(s)BliggantethNotable membersBiokiluluDevoltSolteBelladonna Lilyis the 18th squad of theMillefiore Famiglia. It is an assassination squad introduced inKatekyō Hitman Reborn! Fate of Heat II - Unmei no Futari. The Belladonna Lily is serving under the Millefiore Famiglia, the most powerful Mafia Family in the future. They are the assasination squad of the Family and also the 18th squad of the Family. Like theVaria, the Belladdona Lily is one of the elite assasination squads in Japan. Belladonna Lily's leader isBliggantethand their goal is to protect the Family from enemies. Belladonna Lily is a special squad in Millefiore, being them not to wear Black or White Spell's uniform. They are known also as the Red Spell, because of their group wearing a red uniform with a Belladonna Lily emblem on the right chest.

characters.name: Belphegor
characters.actor_name: Yuki FujiwaraBrandon McInnis(English Dub)Marcello Gobbi(Italian Dub)Giulia Bersani(Italian Dub, as Himeko Hariyama)
characters.description: Belphegorベルフェゴール,Berufegōru?PresentTen Years LaterIdentificationTitlesPrince the Ripper(プリンス・ザ・リッパー,Purinsu za rippā?)Varia Storm GuardianVongola Storm Guardian candidate (former)Aliases(Belphegor,Beru?)Himeko Hariyama / Hime (針山姫子) (his disguise duringArcobaleno Trials Arc)Biographical informationAge16[1]BirthdayDecember 22[1][2]Zodiac signSagittarius[1]RelativesRasiel(older twin brother)StatusActivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight170 cm[1][2]Weight58 kg[1][2]Blood typeAB[1][2]Underground informationFamigliaVongola FamigliaDying Will FlameStorm FlameEquipmentKnivesStorm KnivesWiresBox WeaponVisone TempestaTeamsVariaTeam MammonBehind the scenes informationVoice actorYuki FujiwaraBrandon McInnis(English Dub)Marcello Gobbi(Italian Dub)Giulia Bersani(Italian Dub, as Himeko Hariyama)Stage actorShoichiro OomiYuta Higuchi (-SECRET BULLET-)Anime DebutEpisode 35Manga DebutChapter 90Belphegor, also known asBel, is an assassin working for theVaria, the independent assassination squad of theVongola Famiglia. Himeko Hariyama / Hime (針山姫子) (his disguise duringArcobaleno Trials Arc) Bel has a crescent-shaped birthmark on the right side of his stomach which mirrorsRasiel's mark. His eyes are never shown, but in Volume 24,Lussuriasays in his interview that his eyes are both cool and royal. He has short blonde hair with long bangs and is usually seen wearing the Varia uniform, in addition to a purple striped shirt and a silver tiara that mirrors Rasiel's (Bel wears his tiara on the left side of his head whereas Rasiel's tiara is worn on the right). At present, his hair is styled in a bowl cut; his hairstyle changes in the future and is slightly longer. As a child, Bel wore a white shirt, which distinguished him from Rasiel's black.

characters.name: Bertesca Primo
characters.description: Bertesca PrimoIdentificationTitlesFirst Generation Bertesca bossBiographical informationRelativesGelaro(descendant)Banchiza(descendant)StatusDeceasedPhysical descriptionGenderMaleUnderground informationFamigliaBertesca FamigliaBertesca Primowas the founder of theBertesca Famigliaand thus, its first boss. He was mentioned in the third installment of Fate of Heat DS gameKatekyo Hitman Reborn! DS Fate of Heat III - Yuki no Shugosha Raishuu!. Parvento once stated thatGelarogreatly resembled the Bertesca Primo. Bertesca Primo and the Vongola Primo,Giotto, were close friends, their Famiglias forming alliance together to protect their respective townspeople.

characters.name: Bianchi
characters.actor_name: Rie TanakaBeatrice Caggiula(Italian Dub)Michelle Rojas(English Dub)
characters.description: Bianchi is violent when it comes to her love interests, but is otherwise a kind person. She cares deeply for her half-brother Gokudera, always attempting to help him, and gets happy if he shows signs that he cares for her. As she gets to know Tsuna, she begins to care more for the Vongola, as shown in the future. Her future self acts as an older sister for Haru and Kyoko and shows concern for Chrome, hinting at a kind and helpful side of her. She is usually calm, in contrast to her brother. Where adult Lambo bears a striking resemblance to Bianchi's ex-boyfriend Romeo, as such, upon seeing 15-Year-Old Lambo, Bianchi instantly goes into a rampage wanting to kill him.

characters.name: Bianchi's father
characters.description: Bianchi's fatherBiographical informationRelativesBianchi(daughter)Hayato Gokudera(son)Lavina(mistress)StatusActivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleBehind the scenes informationAnime DebutEpisode 3Manga DebutChapter 10Bianchi's Fatheris the father ofBianchiand her younger half-brotherGokudera Hayato. He's the boss of a famiglia with at least 100 men.[1] In the anime most noticeable feature is perhaps his rather large, dark mustache. His hair is short and dark with a widow's peak, and his eyes are also dark. Like most mafiosi, he wears a simple yet formal combination of suit, undershirt, and tie. In the manga, he is shown to be tall and lean, with dark hair. He's only been seen wearing pinstriped suits.[2][3]

characters.name: Big Pino
characters.description: Big Pinoビッグピノ,Biggupino?Biographical informationStatusActivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleUnderground informationDying Will FlameFlame of NightPartnerSmall GiaTeamsVindiceTeam BermudaBehind the scenes informationManga DebutChapter 392Big Pinois a member ofVindiceand ofTeam Bermuda. Like many other Vindice, Big Pino's true form is that of an rotting zombie-like corpse. Though, his and Small Gia's are more human-like. However, unlike the other Vindice, he has a bulky build, wears a potato sack with one eyehole on his head, and dons a nondescript, plain article of clothing on his upper body. Once he opened his sack, he's shown to be bald and only wearing a pants with Small Gia's weapons attached around his body. Big Pino seems to be unable to form coherent sentences and only mumbles "pipupipipu". He has demonstrated complete obedience toSmall Gia's orders.

He looks older than his true age.
